{{nihongo|'''Numa no Kuni no Miyatsuko'''|怒麻国造|''numa no kuni no miyatsuko'', ''numa kokuzō''}} was a [[kuni no miyatsuko]] who ruled [[#Territory|Numa Province]] (the northern portion of [[Iyo Province]] under the [[ritsuryō provinces|ritsuryō]] system).

== Overview ==
{{出典の明記| section = 1| date = 2023-04}}
According to the "Kokuzō Hongi" of the {{ill|Sendai Kuji Hongi|ja|先代旧事本紀}}, during the reign of [[Empress Jingū]], '''Wakamio-no-Mikoto''', a 3rd-generation descendant of Akihayatama-no-Mikoto who shared the same ancestor as the {{ill|Aki no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|阿岐国造}}, was appointed kuni no miyatsuko. The kuni no miyatsuko's territory was the area then known as '''Numa Province''', corresponding to the later {{ill|Noma District|ja|野間郡}} of [[Iyo Province]], a portion of present-day [[Imabari, Ehime|Imabari City]] in [[Ehime Prefecture]].

The tutelary shrine is '''{{ill|Noma Shrine (Imabari)|ja|野間神社 (今治市)|lt=Noma Shrine}}''', an {{ill|Engishiki shrine|ja|式内社|lt=shikinaisha}} and {{ill|Myōjin Taisha|ja|名神大社}} of Noma District. It is considered a shrine that originated in the veneration of the first kuni no miyatsuko Wakamio-no-Mikoto, his wife Noma-hime-no-Mikoto, and his ancestor Akihayatama-no-Mikoto.

== Tombs ==
{{出典の明記| section = 1| date = 2023-04}}
* {{ill|Ōnishi Myōkenzan Kofun|ja|妙見山古墳 (今治市)|lt=Ōnishi Myōkenzan Kofun}}
*: A [[keyhole-shaped kofun]] 55.2 metres in total length, built in the early [[Kofun period]] ([[4th century]]).
* {{ill|Eguroyama No. 3 Kofun|ja|衣黒山3号墳}}
*: A keyhole-shaped kofun 30 metres in total length, built in the late Kofun period ([[6th century]]).

== Notes ==
{{reflist}}

== References ==
{{脚注の不足|section=1|date=2023-04}}
* Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten Hensan Iinkai (ed.), ''Kadokawa Nihon Chimei Daijiten (Ehime-ken)'', Kadokawa Shoten, 1991, ISBN 4-04-001380-8, pp. 26, 516.

== See also ==
* [[Nankaidō]]

{{Japanese-history-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:ぬまのくにのみやつこ}}
[[Category:伊予国]]
[[Category:伊予国の氏族]]
[[Category:南海道の氏族]]
[[Category:Clans in Shikoku region]]
[[Category:愛媛県の歴史]]
[[Category:Kuni no miyatsuko]]
[[ja:怒麻国造]]
